user.title: SACOMA Smart Scale
user.description: Step on the scale to wake it, then select it below. If it isn't recognised automatically, every nearby Bluetooth device is listed — pick yours by its advertised name.

device.title: Name the scale
device.description: Give this scale a name, then add the people who use it on the next screens.

add_user.title: Add user {index}
add_user.description: Each reading is matched to a user by weight, then their height, age and sex turn the measured impedance into body-fat, muscle and the rest.

data.name: Name
data.user_id: Scale account id (optional, for the display)

error.invalid_weight_range: Minimum weight must be below maximum weight.

abort.no_devices_found: No Bluetooth devices found nearby. Step on the scale to wake it and try again.

device.title: Edit the scale
device.description: Update the scale name and options. You'll re-enter the users on the next screens.

data.name: Name
data.user_id: Scale account id (optional, for the display)

error.invalid_weight_range: Minimum weight must be below maximum weight.
